positive: An intricate, stylized composition featuring bioluminescent flora mixed with abstract celestial bodies. Mandalas of nebula dust form the deep background. Giant, stylized moonflowers and fern fronds frame the central element. The aesthetic should be Neo-Art Deco mixed with Psychedelic Surrealism. Use highly contrasting neon gradients of deep sapphire, electric cyan, and magenta against a matte black void. Clean, sharp silhouettes are paramount, creating a detailed, central graphic suitable for an apparel chest print. Minimalist grunge, high detail, elegant,
